title: ServerTabs (TMFS)
description: Too many fl***** servers? Organize your servers in tabs using servertabs. Thats it.
body:
# TFMS
  Too many flippin servers?
  Tired of scrolling to the bottom for finding a server? 🫪
  **Here's the solution**

## WorldTabs
   Made like a billion test worlds and now you cant find that one survival    world? Well this will help with that too!

## Requires Fabric API
###  ([My website](https://stratcube2.github.io/))

##   Settings!
![Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad1e7eb11198e804ae33e03c3c0305f3515ba54b_0.webp)

### Custom Server Groups:
Create custom tabs to categorize your favorite SMPs, Minigame hubs, and Creative servers.
### Quick Organization:
Hold ALT + Click on a tab to instantly move servers from the "All" list to your specific category.
### Fast Navigation: 
Cycle through your tabs instantly using ALT + W/S directly from the multiplayer menu, no clicking required.
### Minecraftish UI:
Designed to feel like a native part of the Minecraft interface.


## Why did i make this?
- Just wanted to created a mod to organize my servers in my style.
- And add anything i want so thats a win.

"I made this using AI, I have no coding experience, I prompted Claude with my ideas and made it. Tell me an bugs you face during your use of the mod in the [github](https://github.com/StratCube2/servertabs)"
